# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure Function App"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources"
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Storage Account to grant access to"
      }
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault to grant access to"
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Server to grant access to"
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Database to grant access to"
      }
    },
    "cosmosDbAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Cosmos DB Account to grant access to"
      }
    },
    "appServicePlanName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the App Service Plan"
      }
    },
    "functionStorageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Storage Account for Function App internal use"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "keyVaultId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
    "sqlServerId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "sqlDatabaseId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
    "cosmosDbAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]",
    "functionStorageAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('functionStorageAccountName'))]",
    "storageBlobDataReaderRoleId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '2a2b9908-6ea1-4ae2-8e65-a410df84e7d1')]",
    "storageQueueDataContributorRoleId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '974c5e8b-45b9-4653-ba55-5f855dd0fb88')]",
    "storageTableDataContributorRoleId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '0a9a7e1f-b9d0-4cc4-a60d-0319b160aaa3')]",
    "keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6')]",
    "cosmosDbDataContributorRoleId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionStorageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "bypass": "AzureServices"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2022-03-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Y1",
        "tier": "Dynamic"
      },
      "properties": {}
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2022-03-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "ftpsState": "Disabled",
          "minTlsVersion": "1.2",
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName",
              "value": "[parameters('functionStorageAccountName')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING__accountName",
              "value": "[parameters('functionStorageAccountName')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION",
              "value": "~4"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME",
              "value": "dotnet"
            },
            {
              "name": "KeyVaultUri",
              "value": "[concat('https://', parameters('keyVaultName'), '.vault.azure.net/')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "StorageAccountUri",
              "value": "[concat('https://', parameters('storageAccountName'), '.blob.core.windows.net/')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "CosmosDbAccountEndpoint",
              "value": "[concat('https://', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '.documents.azure.com:443/')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "SqlServerName",
              "value": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "SqlDatabaseName",
              "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('functionStorageAccountId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'))]",
      "scope": "[variables('functionStorageAccountId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('storageAccountId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'))]",
      "scope": "[variables('storageAccountId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('storageAccountId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('storageQueueDataContributorRoleId'))]",
      "scope": "[variables('storageAccountId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('storageQueueDataContributorRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('storageAccountId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('storageTableDataContributorRoleId'))]",
      "scope": "[variables('storageAccountId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('storageTableDataContributorRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('keyVaultId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]",
      "scope": "[variables('keyVaultId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-15",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/', guid(variables('cosmosDbAccountId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[concat(variables('cosmosDbAccountId'), '/sqlRoleDefinitions/', variables('cosmosDbDataContributorRoleId'))]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[variables('cosmosDbAccountId')]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    },
    "functionAppPrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
    }
  }
}
